title: Invisible Storage
description: add a few camounflaged storage blocks
body:
# **About this mod 💬**

want something simple, but with the **essence of minecraft vanilla**?
you want to store your stuff, but you want it to go unnoticed? well, this is the ideal mod

your wish has been granted thanks to invisible storage, a mod that adds storage blocks with building block textures

## Features 🌟
- camouflaged storage blocks
- custom creation recipes
- vanilla friendly mod.


# UPDATE 1.1.3 ✨✨

This new version has reworked all the crafting recipes, and now it have a new vanilla friendly craft recipe, here is an example

 ![craft 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6681312f4154322fd957b4ce0a237a32a202ea28.png)![craft 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac1bbbe1a07996859ee50829c079df55c2bbbdd2.png)
